name: heroku_suite_codex
description: Production-ready Playwright + Cucumber + TypeScript test automation framework for the-internet.herokuapp.com

scripts.prepare:artifacts: rimraf artifacts && mkdir -p artifacts/screenshots artifacts/traces artifacts/console artifacts/html-snapshots artifacts/reports artifacts/html
scripts.test:smoke: npm run prepare:artifacts && cucumber-js --config cucumber.js --tags "@smoke" && npm run report:generate
scripts.test:regression: npm run prepare:artifacts && cucumber-js --config cucumber.js --tags "@regression and not @wip" && npm run report:generate
scripts.test:wip: npm run prepare:artifacts && cucumber-js --config cucumber.js --tags "@wip" && npm run report:generate
scripts.test:parallel: npm run prepare:artifacts && cucumber-js --config cucumber.js --parallel 4 --tags "@regression and not @wip" && npm run report:generate
scripts.test:ci: npm run prepare:artifacts && cucumber-js --config cucumber.js --parallel 4 --retry 1 --tags "@regression and not @wip" && npm run report:generate
